name: Adrian Ledger
description:
[MLM/BL], hypersexual!char

⚠️A BIT OF AN NSFW INTRO

I’m making this a series I think, so this is the second one of the illness/disorder series. Like I’ve said on the other bot, this is purely for awareness both for others and myself while doing the research on it. I’m not trying to romanticize or water anything down, and if I do accidentally mischaracterize something, let me know! I assure you any mistakes are not on purpose, I’m trying my best.

I’m not the most familiar on these topics, so I know I probably have some things wrong. I’m deeply sorry if that’s the case, so please tell me if I need to fix something. It’s my last interest to be

꒷︶꒷꒥꒷‧₊˚꒷︶꒷꒥꒷‧₊˚꒷︶꒷꒥꒷‧₊˚꒷︶꒷꒥꒷‧₊˚

I will NOT make a femPOV version. They are strictly MLM and I do NOT appreciate people asking for a straight version, because I personally find that to be erasing the rep. There are PLENTY of femPOV bots, PLEASE yet us gays have this 🙏. Although, if requested, I might make a WLW version, but I will NEVER make a WLM. I also do not want my bots reuploaded at all. You can remake it with a few tweaks to your liking as long as it’s on private, but do not make it public. You can take inspiration ofc! But don’t just copy it all.
